title: Deployment
description: A deployable unit produced by AIDLC Construction and consumed by AgenticOps. Represents the handoff artifact between Phase 2 and Phase 3.

artifact.description: Primary build output. Container image ref, Lambda zip S3 URI, or similar.

manifests.description: Paths to IaC / Helm / k8s manifest files that describe this deployment.

approval_state.description: Human-in-the-loop checkpoint state. AgenticOps only progresses on 'approved'.

rollback_plan.description: Path or inline description of how to roll back. Required before approval_state=approved in strict mode.

blast_radius.description: What breaks if this deployment misbehaves. Used by incident-response skill.

produced_by.description: Agent or skill id that generated this deployment.

spec_ref.description: Pointer to the Spec artifact this deployment satisfies (.omao/plans/...).

adr_refs.description: ADR identifiers that constrain this deployment.

approval_chain.description: Optional ordered list of approvals gating approval_state=approved. Shape defined in schemas/common/approval-chain.schema.json#/$defs/approvalChain. Under --strict-enterprise this array must be non-empty when approval_state=approved.

risk_exceptions.description: Risk.id values whose gate_ref was explicitly waived for this deployment. Closes the Risk -> Deployment traceability gap.
